docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY AMBROSE ENT AS TO DEFENDANT KESTLER KENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMBROSE ENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KESTLER KENT $657.54 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $665.54, 94 DUBOCE NO 16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SF EXECUTION FOR KESTLER RETURNED WHOLLY UNSATISFIED AS TO POSESSION.
